servinfo.title: Passenger Air Bag Deactivation Switch Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Passenger Air Bag Deactivation Indicator Removal and Installation

s1.ptxt: Remove passenger air bag deactivation switch.
Measure resistance between terminal 1 and 2 at air bag ON position and OFF position.

spec.title: Passenger air bag deactivation switch resistance

s1.ptxt: While measuring resistance, move passenger air bag deactivation switch lightly and check that resistance value does not change.
If measured resistance is out of specified value or fluctuates, replace passenger air bag deactivation switch.
